data.name: TotalStock.Expression
data.value: Iif(IsNull([OpenStockReceivingHall]), 0, [OpenStockReceivingHall]) + Iif(IsNull([FarmIntake]), 0, [FarmIntake]) + Iif(IsNull([HatcheryIntake]), 0, [HatcheryIntake]) - Iif(IsNull([RejCracks]), 0, [RejCracks]) - Iif(IsNull([RejWhole]), 0, [RejWhole]) - Iif(IsNull([RejBroken]), 0, [RejBroken]) - Iif(IsNull([RejOther]), 0, [RejOther]) - Iif(IsNull([SellToLogistic]), 0, [SellToLogistic]) - Iif(IsNull([SellOfHatEggs]), 0, [SellOfHatEggs]) - Iif(IsNull([SendToCollage]), 0, [SendToCollage]) - Iif(IsNull([TransToHatchery]), 0, [TransToHatchery]) - Iif(IsNull([SettedEggs]), 0, [SettedEggs]) - Iif(IsNull([St_RejCrack]), 0, [St_RejCrack]) - Iif(IsNull([St_RejWhole]), 0, [St_RejWhole]) - Iif(IsNull([St_RejBroken]), 0, [St_RejBroken]) - Iif(IsNull([St_RejOther]), 0, [St_RejOther]) - Iif(IsNull([EggsToOffal]), 0, [EggsToOffal])

data.name: $this.ScriptsSource
